calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carlito Mandia.
Michael K. Perkins, Esq. for Plaintiff: American Employers Group, Inc. and Applied risk Services.
Plaintiff's witness: Michael Carrington was sworn and examined.
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment as to Plaintiffs and Defendants: Sure Roofing Company and Richard Choy, received and filed in court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Sure Roofing Company, Richard Choy and Leonsio Dejesus Chavez for Declaratory Relief, see scanned doc. for details of Judgment.
Judgment for Declaratory Relief signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-14-2004 Continued To Oct-28-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Michael Perkins, Esq. for Plaintiff: American Employers Group, Inc.
Matter is continued to Oct. 28, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for appearance of Plaintiff's witness and prove-up as to Defendant: Chavez.
